notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly public/visible events (deaths, conflicts, visible cultivation activities) and entity descriptions that are already known to observers. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The relations and events describe visible conflicts and actions (青恒 killed by 冥幽, 青仇 chasing 魔尊幽魂, 紫薇仙子 arranging a formation, 气海老祖 being a clone of 方源) which are either ordinary visible events or already known to relevant actors. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted that meets the criteria of being source-backed private knowledge, future-known, or a directly supported knowledge gap.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
青仇被魔尊幽魂击落后从深坑站起，朝天怒吼，血目狰狞，朝魔尊幽魂方向追去。可见其愤怒和追击行为，但动机可能是仇恨蛊驱使，也可能是个人仇恨。种子只提供了行为描述（被击落、站起、怒吼、追击），没有直接说明其内心动机是复仇还是蛊虫控制。行为可见但动机模糊，不宜强推。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
青家（青家族）是明确的集体家族势力，因七转强者青恒被冥幽斩杀而结仇。种子中青家蛊仙青荆、青华兰、青沉被提议加派出马擒杀冥幽，表明青家集体有复仇/擒杀冥幽的压力。pressureAxis为'复仇冥幽'，likelyReactions为保守的一步反应：调查下落和加派人手。confidence高，因为种子直接支持。
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
